Chaos is unique in that it gives boosts to other realms when you mix it. When you run Chaos + Caro, 2% of your max HP goes into the soul furnace per Chaos character in your team. Since you can consume Soul Furnace for 1:1 HP at any point, this pretty much becomes 2% max HP heal per Chaos character per turn. Paired with the Soul Furnace you get after each battle, it ends up being some nice sustain for Arc 1 stages when you're constantly throwing away 10% of your HP with GHelot lol
